name: DeepSeek MCP Server
what_it_does: DeepSeek MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with DeepSeek language models — sending prompts to DeepSeek Chat and DeepSeek Coder models, executing code reasoning tasks, generating code completions, and integrating DeepSeek's cost-effective LLM capabilities into agent-driven coding assistance and AI inference workflows.
use_cases: Sending prompts to DeepSeek models for code generation from developer agents
Running cost-effective AI inference from budget-conscious agents
Using DeepSeek-Coder for code completion from coding assistant agents
Comparing DeepSeek outputs with other models from evaluation agents
Generating text with high-performance reasoning models from research agents
Accessing frontier AI capabilities at lower cost from production agents
not_for: Teams requiring only OpenAI or Anthropic models (different API)
Teams with data residency requirements outside Asia (DeepSeek servers in China)
Teams needing enterprise SLA or compliance (SOC2, HIPAA) for AI inference
best_when: An agent needs to use DeepSeek models for cost-effective AI inference — particularly for coding tasks where DeepSeek-Coder excels at lower cost than comparable models.
avoid_when: You have strict data residency requirements (DeepSeek processes data in China), or need enterprise compliance guarantees that DeepSeek doesn't offer.

auth.notes: DeepSeek API key from platform.deepseek.com. Single API key for all model access. OpenAI-compatible API format — same request/response structure as OpenAI API.

pricing.notes: DeepSeek offers very competitive pricing — significantly cheaper than OpenAI GPT-4. $5 free credits on signup. No credit card for initial free tier. Community MCP server is open source and free.

performance.rate_limits: 60 RPM for free tier; higher for paid

known_agent_gotchas: Data processed in China — significant data residency concern for regulated industries
OpenAI-compatible API but not identical — some advanced OpenAI features may differ
Service availability may be affected during Chinese holidays or high demand periods
Model names change frequently (deepseek-chat, deepseek-coder, deepseek-reasoner)
Rate limits lower than comparable US providers — careful for high-throughput agent use
Community MCP server — DeepSeek API is new; features and pricing may change
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Data processed in China — critical consideration for regulated industries. Community MCP. Protect API key. Do not send sensitive/confidential data if China data residency is a concern.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key auth. Data processed in China — significant residency concern. Community MCP. Protect API key. Do not send regulated/confidential data.
